criteria.comment: Triggers reference specific channels/events. Outcomes are concrete but could be more measurable.
Skill sequences are logically ordered. Step_order values are correct.
Workflows add multi-step value beyond individual skills. Some workflows may be too close to a single skill with one extra step.
Expected workflows from corpus_meta are mostly present. Complex multi-integration workflows may be under-detected.
All referenced skill_slugs exist in the skill graph.

overall_comment: Workflow composition finds multi-skill chains with reasonable trigger/outcome specificity. Distinctness from single skills could improve. Baseline passes (3.40 / 5.0 > 3.0).
